<path>/home/scott/src/devtools/styles.css</path>
<type>file</type>
<content>1: :root {
2:     --primary: #4A90D9;
3:     --primary-dark: #357ABD;
4:     --secondary: #2C3E50;
5:     --accent: #E74C3C;
6:     --bg-dark: #1a1a2e;
7:     --bg-light: #16213e;
8:     --bg-card: #0f3460;
9:     --text-primary: #ffffff;
10:     --text-secondary: #a0a0a0;
11:     --success: #27ae60;
12:     --warning: #f39c12;
13:     --error: #e74c3c;
14:     --border: #2a2a4a;
15: }
16: 
17: * {
18:     margin: 0;
19:     padding: 0;
20:     box-sizing: border-box;
21: }
22: 
23: body {
24:     font-family: -apple-system, BlinkMacSystemFont, 'Segoe UI', Roboto, Oxygen, Ubuntu, sans-serif;
25:     background: var(--bg-dark);
26:     color: var(--text-primary);
27:     display: flex;
28:     min-height: 100vh;
29: }
30: 
31: .sidebar {
32:     width: 280px;
33:     background: var(--bg-light);
34:     border-right: 1px solid var(--border);
35:     overflow-y: auto;
36:     position: fixed;
37:     height: 100vh;
38:     top: 0;
39:     left: 0;
40: }
41: 
42: .logo {
43:     padding: 20px;
44:     border-bottom: 1px solid var(--border);
45:     background: linear-gradient(135deg, var(--primary), var(--primary-dark));
46: }
47: 
48: .logo h1 {
49:     font-size: 24px;
50:     font-weight: 700;
51:     color: white;
52: }
53: 
54: .nav-categories {
55:     list-style: none;
56:     padding: 10px 0;
57: }
58: 
59: .category {
60:     margin-bottom: 5px;
61: }
62: 
63: .category-header {
64:     display: flex;
65:     align-items: center;
66:     padding: 12px 20px;
67:     cursor: pointer;
68:     transition: background 0.2s;
69:     gap: 10px;
70: }
71: 
72: .category-header:hover {
73:     background: var(--bg-card);
74: }
75: 
76: .category-header .icon {
77:     font-size: 18px;
78: }
79: 
80: .category-header .arrow {
81:     margin-left: auto;
82:     font-size: 12px;
83:     transition: transform 0.2s;
84: }
85: 
86: .category-header.active .arrow {
87:     transform: rotate(180deg);
88: }
89: 
90: .nav-items {
91:     list-style: none;
92:     max-height: 0;
93:     overflow: hidden;
94:     transition: max-height 0.3s ease;
95:     background: var(--bg-dark);
96: }
97: 
98: .nav-items.show {
99:     max-height: 500px;
100: }
101: 
102: .nav-items li a {
103:     display: block;
104:     padding: 10px 20px 10px 50px;
105:     color: var(--text-secondary);
106:     text-decoration: none;
107:     font-size: 14px;
108:     transition: all 0.2s;
109: }
110: 
111: .nav-items li a:hover,
112: .nav-items li a.active {
113:     color: var(--text-primary);
114:     background: var(--bg-card);
115:     border-left: 3px solid var(--primary);
116: }
117: 
118: .content {
119:     margin-left: 280px;
120:     padding: 30px;
121:     flex: 1;
122:     min-height: 100vh;
123: }
124: 
125: .tool-panel {
126:     display: none;
127:     animation: fadeIn 0.3s ease;
128: }
129: 
130: .tool-panel.active {
131:     display: block;
132: }
133: 
134: @keyframes fadeIn {
135:     from { opacity: 0; transform: translateY(10px); }
136:     to { opacity: 1; transform: translateY(0); }
137: }
138: 
139: .tool-panel h2 {
140:     font-size: 28px;
141:     margin-bottom: 25px;
142:     color: var(--text-primary);
143:     border-bottom: 2px solid var(--primary);
144:     padding-bottom: 10px;
145: }
146: 
147: .tool-container {
148:     background: var(--bg-light);
149:     border-radius: 12px;
150:     padding: 25px;
151:     border: 1px solid var(--border);
152: }
153: 
154: .input-section {
155:     margin-bottom: 20px;
156: }
157: 
158: .input-section label,
159: .output-section label,
160: .form-row label {
161:     display: block;
162:     margin-bottom: 8px;
163:     color: var(--text-secondary);
164:     font-weight: 500;
165: }
166: 
167: textarea,
168: input[type="text"],
169: input[type="number"],
170: input[type="datetime-local"],
171: select {
172:     width: 100%;
173:     padding: 12px 15px;
174:     background: var(--bg-dark);
175:     border: 1px solid var(--border);
176:     border-radius: 8px;

178:     font-size: 14px;
179:     font-family: 'Fira Code', 'Monaco', 'Consolas', monospace;

183: 
184: textarea:focus,
185: input:focus,

187:     outline: none;

189: }
190: 
191: textarea {
192:     min-height: 120px;
193: }
194: 
195: .button-group {
196:     display: flex;
197:     flex-wrap: wrap;
198:     gap: 10px;
199:     margin: 20px 0;
200: }
201: 
202: .button-group.vertical {
203:     flex-direction: column;
204: }
205: 
206: button {
207:     padding: 10px 20px;

210:     border: none;
211:     border-radius: 6px;
212:     cursor: pointer;

216: }
217: 
218: button:hover {
219:     background: var(--primary-dark);

221: }
222: 
223: button:active {

227: .output-section {
228:     margin-top: 20px;
229: }

232:     margin-top: 10px;

235: }
236:

239: }
240:

242:     padding: 5px 10px;

245:     margin-left: 10px;

247: }
248: 
249: .checkbox-group {
250:     display: flex;

252:     gap: 15px;
253:     margin: 15px 0;
254: }
255: 
256: .checkbox-group label {
257:     display: flex;
258:     align-items: center;
259:     gap: 8px;
260:     cursor: pointer;
261:     color: var(--text-secondary);
262: }
263: 
264: .checkbox-group input[type="checkbox"] {
265:     width: 18px;

267:     accent-color: var(--primary);
268: }
269: 
270: .form-row {
271:     margin-bottom: 15px;
272:     display: flex;
273:     align-items: center;
274:     gap: 10px;
275: }
276: 
277: .form-row label {
278:     min-width: 120px;
279:     margin-bottom: 0;
280: }
281: 
282: .form-row input[type="text"],
283: .form-row input[type="number"],
284: .form-row input[type="datetime-local"],
285: .form-row select {
286:     flex: 1;
287: }
288: 
289: .status-message {
290:     padding: 10px 15px;
291:     border-radius: 6px;
292:     margin: 10px 0;
293:     font-size: 14px;
294: }
295: 
296: .status-message.success {
297:     background: rgba(39, 174, 96, 0.2);
298:     color: var(--success);

300: }
301: 
302: .status-message.error {
303:     background: rgba(231, 76, 60, 0.2);
304:     color: var(--error);
305:     border: 1px solid var(--error);
306: }
307: 
308: .diff-container {
309:     display: flex;
310:     gap: 20px;
311: }
312: 
313: .diff-panel {
314:     flex: 1;
315: }
316: 
317: .diff-panel textarea {
318:     height: 200px;
319: }
320: 
321: .diff-output {
322:     background: var(--bg-dark);
323:     border-radius: 8px;
324:     padding: 20px;
325:     font-family: monospace;
326:     white-space: pre-wrap;
327:     overflow-x: auto;

331:

333:     background: rgba(39, 174, 96, 0.3);
334: }

338: }

563: .strength-bar.strong::before { width: 100%; background: var(--success); }
